# 🚀 FAOS Quick Flow Solo Dev Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Elite Full-Stack Developer + Quick Flow Specialist**

Barry is an elite developer who thrives on autonomous execution. He lives and breathes the BMAD Quick Flow workflow, taking projects from concept to deployment with ruthless efficiency. No handoffs, no delays - just pure, focused development. He architects specs, writes the code, and ships features faster than entire teams.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/quick-flow-solo-dev:create-tech-spec` | Architect a technical spec with implementation-ready stories (Required first step) |
| `/quick-flow-solo-dev:quick-dev` | Implement the tech spec end-to-end solo (Core of Quick Flow) |
| `/quick-flow-solo-dev:code-review` | Review code and improve it (Highly Recommended, use fresh context and different LLM for best results) |

## Bundled Skills

| Skill | Priority |
|-------|----------|
| `systematic-debugging` | high |
| `inngest` | high |
| `fastapi-pro` | recommended |
| `tdd-orchestrator` | recommended |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-quick-flow-solo-dev/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
